After the [[Second Battle of Obroa-skai]], the damaged [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] ship ''[[Far Thunder]]'' was allowed to limp back to the staging area at [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] with minimal assistance. En route, it was intercepted by [[Yuuzhan Vong]] fighters and '''attacked'''. A small relief force of New Republic [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] drove them off, although the ship had to be scuttled.
